entry.title: Zork Grand Inquisitor v2.1.2
entry.content:
This is an improvement release that also includes tweaks and fixes.
**This release IS compatible with games generated on the previous version**
- **Improvement:** Checked locations are now seeded from the AP server upon connection. Helps with granting missable locations upon further reconnections - **Improvement:** After sliding the Zork Rocks in the locker and backing out, the explosion will happen immediately! No need to wait for the full countdown - **Tweak:** Mead Light is now a permanent item to avoid the possibility of a rare entrance randomizer softlock - **Tweak:** Mead Light? and ZIMDOR is Undamaged are no longer considered missable - **Tweak:** Spell Check Complete is now considered missable and granted when going back to the scroll box after imbuing BEBURTT - **Fix:** Addressed an issue where missable locations with multiple location requirements would be granted right away after meeting 1 requirement

entry.title: Zork Grand Inquisitor v2.2.0
entry.content:
This is an improvement release.
**This release IS compatible with games generated on the previous version**
- **Improvement:** Switched supported ScummVM version from 2.7.1 (March 2023) to 2026.2.0 (March 2026) - This up-to-date ScummVM version feature numerous improvements for ZVision (the Zork Grand Inquisitor game engine): - Completely overhauled rendering + proper widescreen support - Improvements to quality of 3D directional audio & nonlinear volume scaling - Restored functionality of some in-game options controls - Game script fixes
**IMPORTANT**
A vanilla game script refers to a non-existent file regardless of the game version you own. That file will need to be created to avoid ScummVM crashing when operating the totemizer. Locate `me00h64p.raw` (for GOG, it's in `zassetse\eng_aud`; for Steam, it's in `ZASSETS2\MONAST2`). Make a copy and rename it to `me00h62p.raw`. The file has always been missing, but later ScummVM versions started crashing instead of ignoring the exception

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.3
entry.content:
This release brings stability improvements to logic :information_source: This client IS retrocompatible with older version 0.8.x version (not alpha/beta), so you can update during an ongoing game. :warning: This apworld is NOT retromcompatible with previous clients. To use it, update your client to 0.8.3.
## New yaml option * Plentiful Buildings: Additional Building Copies to the pull
## Bug fixes * Fix Hardcore achievements being impossible. It now requires to bake 1Q cookies without buying Cookie Upgrades. It's now in sphere 2 * Fix some prestige items unlocking themselves after ascending * Fix eggs achievements not checking properly * Improve logic for more sphere stability. It should hopefully fix trackers telling you unreachable checks being "in logic"
## Acknowledgements * @SoraUltimateProgrammer made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/1 * @wjg999 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/4 * @TeamLila made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/2
Thanks a lot for helping grow this apworld !!
## Misc. * This github now has a [discussion space](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/discussions) ! You can send ideas there and express opinions. This is a place that comes in addition to the AP discord server, in order to keep track of ideas

entry.title: Parkitect v1.4.1
entry.content:
Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)
Enjoy!
NOTE: This release is not backwards compatible with seeds generated **before** 1.2.1 This release may not fully compatible with seeds generated **before** 1.4.0
# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes ## QOL - TrapLink can now be changed with commands via the Archipelago Window Input Field (Case & whitespace insensitive !) - !!toggleTrapLink - !!joinTrapLink - !!leaveTrapLink

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.4
entry.content:
This release is a hotfix and only includes updates of the client. :information_source: This release is retrocompatible with 0.8.3. See [0.8.3](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/releases/tag/0.8.3) for more details on retrocompatibility.
## Fix 3rd occurrence of Progressive temple would not correctly unlock the upgrade.
## Notes Just updating your client is fine and will fix the issue. You will received the upgrade upon connection. Apworld is identical to 0.8.3

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.33
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed multiple changes to the base ROM being reverted in previous updates - Made the Plasma grunts in Chargestone Cave always stay in the cave - This fixes them potentially never appearing when playing through Chargestone Cave in reverse - Added an NPC to the southern entrance of Chargestone Cave that throws you to the northern exit - He only appears after defeating N in Chargestone Cave - Removed the forced Musical Theater dress up minigame - Fixed the fight with N in Nacrene City being missable when doing the Pinwheel Forest events before that - Added a bit of funny dialog at the start of the game - Added an NPC next to the Pokémon Center in Accumula Town, who will be used for a feature in 0.4.0
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.0
entry.content:
Adds in-game Archipelago messages and three optional "sanity" check categories (Battlesanity, Bestiary, QuestSanity), plus logic and naming fixes.
> **⚠️ Upgrade notes (read before updating)** > - **Both files must be updated together:** install the new `witchspringrap.apworld` **and** the new `WitchSpringRArchipelago.dll`. They are a matched pair. > - **Generate fresh seeds** with 0.3.0 — the new options and checks won't exist on older seeds. > - The new check categories are **optional toggles, off by default** — your existing yaml keeps working unchanged.
### In-game messages - The game now shows **"Sent <item> to <player>"** when you trigger a check and **"Received <item> from <player>"** when an item is delivered, in the top-left info bar.
### New optional check categories (yaml toggles) - **Please note that naming conventions and logic may not be fully proper for these settings as of yet** - **Battlesanity** — a check for clearing each field battle (sends on win). ~136 checks. - **Bestiary** — a check for defeating each enemy; any rank/shield variant counts. ~101 checks. - **QuestSanity** — a check for completing each quest (main + request-board; sends when the quest is cleared, however it completes). ~140 checks. - Each is a separate toggle (default **off**); the item pool auto-pads with filler so seeds stay fillable when they're enabled.
### Fixes - **Region name:** "Blackhill Golem Cave" corrected to **"Backhill Golem Cave"**. - **Arua Blessing** now also requires the Fire Magic Spellbook and Mind Control Circle (it isn't actually reachable until you can leave the starting area). - Minor per-check chapter-gating fixes from playtesting.

entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.1
entry.content: Forgot to save the basic logic to questsanity. Still not perfect, but better than before

entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.2
entry.content: Updated logic for Battlesanity/Questsanity/Bestiary Also added Livya, Justice and Demon of Greed who were previously missing from the list.

entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.3
entry.content:
Updated logic for Chapters 3+4 in regards to Bestiary/Questsanity/Battlesanity.
- Added some missing enemies from the Bestiary - Removed 2 chests from Aimhards Temple - either I forgot where they are, or they're NG+ only, will review in more detail later. - Pushed some battles/enemies into logic in a later chapter, even if they're already accessible just due to difficulty spike on them. - Moved Volcano Road 3 and Royal Pudding to Chapter 5+ logic, since you gain access to them after the "To Elysion Temple" quest and I currently have no good way to track that in the logic documents. Safer bet this way. - Re-Added the South Island chest that was removed in the last update. Also renamed it.

entry.title: Phoenotopia: Awakening v0.3.0
entry.content:
0.3 is here!

It took a little longer than I expected, but the project is finally ready for a new release.

New features:

- **Almost 200 new checks**: Sunflower Road, the kingdom bridges, the Atai region, Sand Drifts and the Ouroboros Hideout are now included as locations, setting the total check count at 274. The new goal of your run is to defeat Birdy and the giant sand drake boss. Anything beyond that point in the story is the new out of bounds border for checks you can get. Special thanks to @ET_is_here for helping me with the logic here! - **Redistribution of checks among settings**: A lot of checks were about to fall under miscellaneous so I redid the distribution of settings. New settings include items in breakable objects, freestanding items, sidequests, minigames, trapchest, Ouroboros shrines, perro locations and the ancient vault. - **Spell of Rejuvenation / Progressive Prelude of Panselo**: With the Spell of Rejuvenation now in the item pool, you will now have the option to either get them progressively or separately. Doesn't make a difference with the current location pool, but the choice is yours. - **No more waiting while saving**: You will no longer have to stand still for 3 seconds when you save at a savepoint. I hope this will lower the bar of effort to go for a save. The waiting time was only for immersion anyway. - **Complete rework on NPC check handling**: You won't notice a thing, but I sure will. The way I implemented the handling for NPC checks was unsustainable for the rest of the game and I had to redo it entirely. It's cleaner and will save me many hours when adding the rest of the locations to the game. Aside from this, a lot of work was done under the hood to make the project more expandable. Like always, the community will be my testing crew. If you encounter any issues during your run, please let me know through one of the following ways: 1. File an issue at the repository on [GitHub](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/issues). 2. Describe your issue in the game thread on the [official AP discord](https://discord.com/invite/8Z65BR2). 3. Post it in the mwgg-support channel in the [Unofficial AP Discord](https://discord.multiworld.gg).

Known issues:

- After buying one item from the Atai bartender, the text for the other item will go back to the vanilla text as well. This is only visual so you can still buy the other item. - Taking the water route from the Metro area to the left side of the Atai sewer with rocket boots and without the lifesaver will cause you to infinitely drown.

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.5
entry.content:
This release brings stability improvements to logic :information_source: This client IS retrocompatible with older version 0.8.x version (not alpha/beta), so you can update during an ongoing game. :warning: This apworld is NOT retromcompatible with previous clients. To use it, update your client to 0.8.3.
## New yaml option * Plentiful Buildings: Additional Building Copies to the pull
## Bug fixes * Fix Hardcore achievements being impossible. It now requires to bake 1Q cookies without buying Cookie Upgrades. It's now in sphere 2 * Fix some prestige items unlocking themselves after ascending * Fix eggs achievements not checking properly * Improve logic for more sphere stability. It should hopefully fix trackers telling you unreachable checks being "in logic" * Fix last tier of Progressive temples not unlocking * Fix 0.8.3/0.8.4 bug of Progressive Buildings not unlocking buildings
## Acknowledgements * @SoraUltimateProgrammer made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/1 * @wjg999 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/4 * @TeamLila made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/2
Thanks a lot for helping grow this apworld !!
## Misc. * This github now has a [discussion space](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/discussions) ! You can send ideas there and express opinions. This is a place that comes in addition to the AP discord server, in order to keep track of ideas

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.3.1
entry.content: Fixes a regression that made the apworld incompatible with the Citra emulator. This release is backward compatible with v0.3.0.

entry.title: Etrian Odyssey v0.3.1
entry.content:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.3.1 [Beta]
Small hotfix.
This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.
The host does not need to install this version. Game generated with 0.3.0 are compatible with this. Only patching and the client are changed. Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.
This version requires the [patcher version v0.3.1](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.3.1).
## Fixes
- Client bug causing inventory items to be skipped under specific circumstance when the item reception buffer got full. - Quest 09 (Explorers Guild Trial) custom event playing on every tiles.

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.10.3
entry.content:
## Changes - The client should now properly write the required TTYD settings in dolphin to the correct config, on Windows and Mac/Linux. It is now recommended to let the client set these for you instead of manually, and it is safe to uncheck the settings in dolphin and let the per-game config take over. - Patching will no longer fail with a patch/apworld mispatch, it will now warn you in the client that you should update to match them.
## Fixes - Fix for some tattlesanity locations being bugged and sending out early, and having some unintended consequences including crashing and setting random story flags - Fix for deathlink not sending or being received correctly. - Shop locations will now properly follow the shop purchase limit rule with remote items enabled - Tattles and some boxes that weren't syncing properly will now properly sync in same slot co-op and when starting a new file with an in-progress game.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/ArchipelagoTTYD/compare/v0.10.2...main

entry.title: Parkitect v1.5.0
entry.content: Well as usual you find all information at the [mod](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect/releases/tag/1.5.0)!

entry.title: Portal 2 v0.7.2
entry.content:
## Additions
- Added integrated UT support (thanks to Tenebrosful) - Added polling to only flush command queue while in game (delays deathlink and traps until the play enters a map) - Updated speedrun logic (thanks to Savvydruid)
See the [mod page](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) for previous additions.
## Note You must use the latest (v0.7.0) version of the [Portal 2 Archipelago Mod](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) with this version of the apworld.

entry.title: Phantasy Star II v0.1.2
entry.content: Bug fix for `Exception: world.item_data is 127 long`.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.34
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed client crashes resulting from the recently added funny dialog - Fixed small bugs of the recently added funny dialog - Tweaked the Chargestone Cave chuckster throwing animation - Fixed the new NPC in Accumula Town not appearing
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: Banjo Tooie v4.12.1
entry.content: # 4.12.1 - Thanks to Umed for the following fixes: - Fixes for Ares and Gopher64 - removing lua arguments (breaking Bizhawk) - Remove "Press B to Skip" text from Signposts

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.8
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.8
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.4.1b0
entry.content:
Changes from v0.4.0-beta - Floor 5 shops no longer have prices fixed at 4 gold per item - Level up rewards now respect equipment availability - Upgrade level rewards are now Copies if playing with Upgrade all equipment
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.4.0-beta...v0.4.1-beta

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.8.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.8
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.1.0
entry.content:
You must build the 0.1.0 sm64ex build for use with this apworld. Going forward, updates that break compatibility between the apworld and the sm64ex build will increment the first or second value of the version number, non-breaking updates will increment the last value. The "archipelago" sm64ex branch will always be the latest, but you may also enter a version number to get an older version.
- Non-stop mode is enabled by default, with a patch file provided to return it to "stop mode." - Freestanding 1-Ups and "Exclamation Boxes" have been combined into one option: One Up Checks. - A new option has been added: Blocksanity. Adds checks for breaking all exclamation blocks and cap blocks. - Hazy Maze Cave is now included in Locked Paintings. - Tiny Island and Huge Island paintings are unlocked separately. - Several logic adjustments and fixes. - Location and Item name groups have been added. - Item name and classifications were adjusted. - No Despawns now grants coins and 1-Ups that end up on deadly quicksand. Mini Goombas now drop their coin if they attack. - The coins spawned during the final Bowser battle no longer increment your coin counter.

entry.title: Outer Wilds v1.2.2
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/OuterWildsArchipelagoRandomizer#installation).
- @RS_Mind attempted to work around a Forgotten Castaways bug where the "Recursive Node" sometimes doesn't spawn. It's too inconsistent for anyone to pin down exact causes, but we suspect having many other mods loaded makes it more likely, which would explain why only randomizer players seem to be reporting it. - Logic fixes: - Since you can't carry both a DLC Artifact and the Echo Hike Threader at the same time, Starlit Cove is no longer in logic if the Threader is your only logical way of reaching Cinder Isles (fixes #98 ). - Added an explicit "Hearth's Neighbor Museum Plate" region to the HN1 logic to help remind players how to unlock the warp to the HN1 system - Suitless logic for the text wheel inside the Frozen Shuttle now requires Spacesuit - "DW: Starlit Cove Upper Tower Floors" logic is now aware that Raft Docks Patch is an alternative to Dream Totem Patch - "Find Gabbro's Ship" location is no longer incorrectly triggered by the ship on Bracket's Rest in FQ. - Fix Nomai text coloring exception spam on unscouted locations (the feature is still unsupported/broken, but this quick fix reduces the odds of it breaking unrelated stuff)

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.4
entry.content:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/setup_en.md) - [Q&A](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/en_DELTARUNE.md)
Hello, this is the last patch before the embargo of chapter 5, expect no update before the 2.1.0 chapter 5 release. Dev will begin at least 1 week after the chapter release. DELTARUNE in 2 tomorrow.
## **This will be the last version before Chapter 5 drops. From then, there will be a week embargo before development of this mod resumes. If you want to play this mod, you'll have to downpatch your base DELTARUNE back to version 1.04, which is the last version before chapter 5 (More info on the Archipelago Discord). Stay tuned!**
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta, the Ch1+2 Demo, or Chapter 5 versions will not work.)
**Linux is not supported for now and will disconnect you after few seconds from the server! Linux will be supported in future updates**
**Starting a chapter with previous chapter completion data isn't recommended for right now as the rewrite wasn't made with it in mind. This will be fixed soon!**
# Changelog ## APWorld - Added TensionBit and BShotBowtie to the Fusion Ingredient category - Fix Accessibility for TwistedSwd and TensionBow
## Game - Game now properly goal again.. oops - Saving settings is now before scouting locations - Grouping some location checks into a single package instead of multiple - Most locations will now send before the textbox appears, in case of a softlock - Added some missing reward previews ### Chapter 3 - Fixed the Shadow Mantle fight only being accessible if you _did not_ have the SHELTER KEY - Made the room with the Shuttah and Zapper encounter immune to receiving items as it can softlock the game.. for some reason
# Known bug - Exclude Z-Rank option don't work and actually reads Exclude T-Rank instead

entry.title: Spirit Valley v2.0.1
entry.content:
- (Client) Fixed old masters main quest not asking for right spirit - (Client) Fixed Certain items not being added to inventory properly - (Client) Added colour to console
V2.0.0 changelog - (APWorld/Client) Added Option/Logic for Disabling Main/Side Quests - (APWorld/Client) Added Option/Logic for Different Goals (Complete all Main Missions(deafult), Catch all Spirits, Catch all Rare Spirits, Get All Spirits to Max Affection) - (APWorld/Client) Added Items/Logic for Mission Warps(TumbleweedTown -> CrashSite, CoconutVillage Temple -> ColdHarbor, Trail18 -> Trail19) when Main Missions are Disabled - (APWorld/Client) Added locations for EV-3 Side Quests in HQ unless Side Quests are Disabled (NOTE: these will not be filled with progression items at this time) - (APWorld) Fixed errors in Default Trainers - (Client) Fixed not sending location when defeating Alice on Trail 11 - (Client) Made Mission Warps(TumbleweedTown -> CrashSite, CoconutVillage Temple -> ColdHarbor, Trail18 -> Trail19) Repeatable - (Client) Made Quest/Boss battles still happen when Main/Side Missions are Disabled - (Client) Added codes "$goal" and "$stuck"
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
CLIENT: - Have Spirit Valley Installed - Download Spirit Valley Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Spirit Valley Archipelago Client V#.#.#.zip" to the directory where "SpiritValley.exe" is
APWORLD (needed for generating archieplago game): - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Spirit Valley APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Spirit Valley APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recommended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default spirit valley YMAL

entry.title: Library of Ruina v1.0.0
entry.content:
As always, check known bugs and report bugs in #70
**Unsubscribe from workshop mod!**
**NEW RUN REQUIRED**
**Uses -epsilon .apworld** ## What changed since -alpha: <details> <summary>In older versions</summary>
### In -beta: - FIXED: Custom books are now properly saved - FIXED: Now you can't put books into the invitation manually, and can't find receptions earlier that way - FIXED: Impossible Passive Attribution Points (Needs testing, but i'm 99% sure it's fixed now) - FIXED: Receptions are no longer visible after joining new session without closing the game - FIXED: It's not possible to open Black Silence and Distorted Ensemble before you reach those battles ### In -gamma: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. the reception box of doom. It's only for testing, so bear with me. - CHANGED & FIXED: Changed how run seeds work. Fixed stuff related to them (also thanks Yar) ### In -delta: - ADDED: Modified passive attribution system. Can now attribute up to 16 books. Passive Limits Break Item now works - FIXED: Impossible keypages and pages don't drop now (i hope)
</details>
### In -epsilon: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. It's a pretty simple Sugiyama's algorithm with minimized edge-crossing for now. Hopefully i can figure out something fancier later. Also cool placement for endgoals - CHANGED: The checkmark for completed stages been changed to be a "status" of the stage: Checkmark is shown when the reception is cleared (completed + all checks collected); An exclamation mark is shown when the reception can be cleared (player has right books to start the stage) - CHANGED: Suppressions/Realization are now accessed on the map the say way Receptions are. - CHANGED: Playing with "Enemies Turn Into Checks" Option now sends remaining checks on stage clear (main purpose of that option was always to allow to chip at the enemy and get more checks to potentially escape BK situation, and not fight Xiao 8 times) - CHANGED: Items should now get received faster when in bulk (PLEASE REPORT ANY CRASHES!) - CHANGED: Custom icons are now also used for BoE (not yet available tee hee), Booster Packs and library progress level - ADDED: Floor Stages (Abnos/Realizations) now have a roman number specifying the order of the stage - ADDED: Shuffle Reverb Ensemble Floors option - ADDED: Endgoals always unlocked option - FIXED: Binah librarian shortage \[By Yar] - FIXED: Divide by 0 error \[By Yar] - FIXED: Keter Realization now works properly (Snow queen part & snow queen suppression are not fixed yet, also when binah is replaced by angela, angela will be locked if player doesn't have Binah item, not sure if i have to fix that) - FIXED: Item hints position on differently sized screens (SOMEONE PLEASE TEST AND TELL ME IF IT WORKS!) - FIXED: Leave stage button in the team setup window before the fight now works all the time - FIXED: Binah (and librarians with base keypages) can now get passives attributed - REMOVED: The chapter shortcut buttons for the map & chapter filter for book burning screen have been removed - REMOVED: The option to NOT randomize the reception tree is DISCONTINUED!

entry.title: Dragon Ball Z Budokai Tenkaichi 2 v0.3.3
entry.content: Save Skip Option Added

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.5.0
entry.content: This is an EXPERIMENTAL release to add the BlockEntrances option, which, if set to true, locks out certain scene transitions in the game until the item is sent to the user. For use with the 0.6.0 bg3 mod.

entry.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.1.2
entry.content:
# v0.1.2 Random starting weapon **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.1.1...yohane_bitdb-v0.1.2
# Changes - Adds a `random_starting_weapon` option that replaces the default Katar starting item with a random weapon
# Bug fixes - Logic fixes regarding Riko and Sea of Trees - Damage Link now actually triggers correctly depending on the DamageLink setting

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.5.8
entry.content: Changed how the Master Ball Cup clears are checked.

entry.title: Rabbit and Steel v0.3.4
entry.content:
fixed: - Progressive Region bug - 4+ Shira bug
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/) and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
## [v0.3.4](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/compare/v0.3.3...v0.3.4) - 2026-06-22
### Commits
- Fix progressive regions and Shira 4+ bugs [`e5e8ad7`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/e5e8ad7b3b3079ea044234b9faaff04017f8a7be)

entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.4
entry.content:
### GENERAL - Finalized first pass at logic for Bestiary/Questsanity/Battlesanity for Chapters 1-6.(I accidentally set my yaml for a Chapter 7 goal instead of Chapter 9, that's on me, running a second pass now) - Fixed a black-screen crash that could happen when multiple items were sent at once while you were changing scenes. - Fixed the "Sent ____" popup from re-appearing every time you re-load the game. It never re-sent the checks, it was just the UI firing again. - New in-game event gates. - Added a fake "Narrel" item that you must receive from the multiworld for Narrel to move the boulder. - Prototype Steam Engine and Matt's Garden Key are now correctly blocked from the vanilla item grant. - Giving the Prototype Steam Engine to Kanna, *should* be gated and not allowed to happen until you receive the Prototype Steam Engine from the multiworld - **untested and I am working on this test**
### Battlesanity - Numbers have been re-numbered based on the order that I fought them on the map. I tried to go from closest to entrance > farthest from entrance order. - Added some Story/Event battles that were not previously logged.
### Bestiary - Added more missing mobs from chapters 5+ - Fixed the logic on a bunch of them
### Disclaimer I do **not** recommend setting a goal beyond Chapter 3(Goal: Chapter_4), because I have not had a chance to test the new Narrel block as of yet. I wanted to push this out early once I found out about the black-screen crash introduced in 0.3.3

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.6
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- New location name groups from @LuigiXRules: "Hackable Statue Rewards", "Miniboss Rewards", "Lear's Grave", "Database Locations" and "Shanhai" - `vanilla` logic: - Back when shop rando was implemented, "FSP: Give Yi's Portrait to Chiyou" was incorrectly moved into one of the logical shop regions. This has been fixed. - Added a missing connection from "OW - Root Node & Middle Exits" down to "OW - Lower Right Exit", since you can simply fall down. - "Sky Tower - Right Exit" to "Upper Exit & Root Node" now allows Ledge Grab instead of Wall Climb. - `medium` logic: - The climb to "CTH - Yanren Arena" now allows just nymph and Wall Climb, since you can use T-dash to reach the moving crate without TCK. - "Cortex Center: Crystal Caves Central Chamber" is now in logic with only Charged Strike - The "Factory (U) - Main Intersection" to "Broken Shanhai (with qi)" connection now allows Charged Strike and Swift Runner. - The "Moving Boxes" part of Factory (U) now allows bow hovering between the boxes. - The "Factory (U) - Upper Elevator" to "Behind Moving Boxes" connection for Thunder Bustering the one-way barrier now also requires CL or LG in order to climb up the ledge. - The jump from "GoS (Entry) - Root Node" to "GoS (Entry) - Coffin" is now itemless because of Swift Runner. - Added a missing connection from "GoS (Entry) - Greenhouse" to the whole right side of GoS (Entry). This only matters if you can climb up to GoSY Greenhouse from the left side, which is only possible on `medium` and `ledge_storage`. - "GoS (East): Spike Ball Hall Upper Left" now allows T-dashing over the gap between platforms if you have access to the GoS (East) root node, because the archers near the root node are a viable qi source. - "GoS (West) - Root Node" to "Luyan's Tomb" now allows bow hover into Cloud Leaping onto the Wall Climb surface. - `ledge_storage` logic: - "AF (Depths) - Crystal Caves" to "Upper Left Exit" is now in logic with only triple jump and grapple. - "ED (Passages): Above Transporter" is now in logic with just Ledge Grab, Cloud Leap and Bow Hover, because you can use a wall slide at the end instead of Tai-Chi Kick. - The "Moving Boxes" part of Factory (U) now allows parry hovering between the boxes. - "GoS (Entry) - Root Node" to "GoS (Entry) - Greenhouse" is now in logic with just Air Dash and Ledge Grab because you can wall slide here. - "GoS (East): Spike Ball Hall Floor" to "Above Lower Exit" now allows LS vault with T-dash setup if you have access to the root node, because the archers near the root node are a viable qi source. - "IW - Above Frogs" to "Upper Left" removed the Charged Strike requirement for killing the shielded beetle, i.e. it's now in logic to do LS setup and triple jump here while avoiding an invincible beetle. - "IW - Upper Left" to "Tao Fruit" now allows triple jumping before the crusher hits you instead of riding the sides of the crates with Wall Climb. - Triple jumping from "TRC - Lower Sickbay" to "TRC - Upper Levels" is now in logic. - "OW - Activate Crates And Return" now allows triple jumping to the hack point instead of wall climbing.

entry.title: Civilization V v0.10.2
entry.content:
**Changes**: - Added all sanity options to the slot data such that the Poptracker can read them.
**Fixes**: - Fixed issue where the Settler descriptions in settler sanity were not correctly ordered. - Fixed issue where the Chariot Archer description was not properly updated if it had a location (due to a typo in Civ V itself). - Fixed issue where city-state influence filler and trap items did not work properly.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1313e/Civ-V-AP-World/compare/v0.10.1...v0.10.2

entry.title: Ship of Harkinian v1.4.0
entry.content:
This release addresses some major and minor bugs introduced in the 1.3.0 release. We highly recommend people that haven't started their run yet to update first. There's no yaml differences compared to 1.3.0, but keep in mind our client isn't backwards compatible so you need to use the same client version as the APWorld version that was used to generate the multiworld.
# Fixes
- Fixed generation failing when generating with a 'A Link to the Past' world (and possibly other worlds). - Fixed logic issue with Fire Temple boss key loop thinking a key wasn't required to open the door even when keys were shuffled outside of the dungeon. - Fixed Starting Ammo option not working in-game. - Fixed generation issue when generating with Linked Items that show up in static hints. - Fixed logic issue with the coffins in BotW being reversed. - Added special character handling in hints. - Trap names and Gossip stone hints are now deterministic (always the same for the same seed). - Fixed Triforce Hunt immediately receiving items from goaling even before warping to the credits. - Fixed Version Checking - Fixed compatibility issues with games that use very large id numbers (such as paper mario)
# Known Issues - A fix to filter out unsupported characters accidentally also filters out one of the supported characters. - We've taken your L's but only the lowercase ones

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.8
## Client Change - Reverted a change from 0.5.6 that may be causing atla to not send locations - Gave Shamshir its missing 4 points of mage slayer
No .apworld changes made; works with older worlds/saves

entry.title: Hammerwatch v4.1.1
entry.content:
Logic fix for AvF9: SE Button Sequence
Get the latest client release here: https://github.com/Parcosmic/HammerwatchAPMod/releases
If you're new or looking for some more information check out the links below: Setup guide: https://github.com/Parcosmic/Hammerwatch-Archipelago/blob/dev/worlds/hammerwatch/docs/setup_en.md Info page: https://github.com/Parcosmic/Hammerwatch-Archipelago/blob/dev/worlds/hammerwatch/docs/en_Hammerwatch.md

entry.title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1 + 2 v1.2.0
entry.content:
This is a feature release that also includes improvements, tweaks and fixes.
**This release SHOULD be compatible with games generated on the previous version**
- **Feature:** The Universal Tracker tab and features will now be embedded in the Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1+2 Client (provided you have the latest Universal Tracker APWorld installed) - **Improvement:** The Epic Game Store (EGS) version of the game is now supported (!) - **Improvement:** Universal Tracker will now show locations that might be possible to get out of logic - **Improvement:** Universal Tracker location labels will now be sorted by skater -> level -> location (i.e. grouped by skater). Location names remain unchanged - **Tweak:** Rescaled base target scores of non-objective based levels so they are less trivial - **Tweak:** School II's secret tape no longer has item requirements - **Fix:** Addressed an issue where some traps of the same type could be skipped when receiving a large quantity of items at once (fixed proposed by josephwhite; thanks!) - **Fix:** Added an extra linebreak at the end of the spoiler header

entry.title: Marble It Up! Ultra v0.2.0
entry.content:
*This is a client-only update. Multiworlds generated on v0.2.0-alpha will still function.*
**CLIENT:** Temporarily disabled the duplicate item handler to prevent a bug that would cause the client not receive items properly.

entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0
entry.content:
Number goes up to v0.4.0, more features, here's what's new:
### Life-Sanity: - Adds 42 checks for collecting free-standing lives (this doesn't include lives spawned from boxes)
### Life Count Checks: - Option to add checks for reaching certain life counts - This can be any combination of numbers from 5-99 - The randomization logic will consider higher life counts as occurring "later" - This effect is accomplished by making the logic think that higher life counts require a larger amount of crystals
### Bug Fixes: - Added missing logic for regular exits when Gimmick Lock is enabled - The client will now print errors if you reset the console or connect before the game loads, notifying you to restart/reconnect the client
### Death Link: ### Gimmick Lock: ### Location Groups: - If you haven't kept up with the pre-releases up to this point, you can find their [release notes here](https://github.com/Sim10XXX/C2AP/releases) for more information on these features, and other bug fixes
### Known Issues: - When using warp randomizer, exiting Totally Fly always puts you in the 4th warp room, which can give access to the 4th warp room early - Respawning at the last checkpoint without Polar in each Polar level can result in a double-death - Going through a Polar/Jetpack level without Polar/Jetpack unlocked can sometimes crash the game - This is due to limitations of the game itself (since you're not expected to be running around as regular Crash) - Also use [GitHub issues](https://github.com/Sim10XXX/C2AP/issues) or the [Crash 2 AP thread](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1371461990794657863) to report bugs or suggest stuff

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.6.0
entry.content: Added new options for setting the badges required to open Victory Road and setting how many GLC keys are in the starting inventory.

entry.title: Ship of Harkinian v1.4.1
entry.content:
Our previous release introduced a new system to filter out characters which are not supported in the Ocarina of Time font during save file creation. However due to an issue in our supported character table all lowercase L's were getting cut too.
This patch release fixes this issue and should be backwards compatible with previously generated 1.4.0 multiworlds. You will have to create a new save file in order in order for the changes to take effect on an existing slot.
## Full change log - Fixed lowercase L's being seen as an unsupported character. - Fixed logic issue with the wolfos grotto in the sacred forest meadow. - Fixed logic issue with returning from the Deku tree boss room to the basement.

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.1
entry.content:
A few generation related fixes here... The client is compatible with 1.0.X generated seeds.
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/blob/main/docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## Fixes * Fix require star logic (sand pit check) * Fix spamming debug data when generating * Fix determinism issues * Fix generation sometimes failing at sand pit
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.1

entry.title: Lethal Company v0.7.12b0
entry.content:
Mod: * filler usage is now properly networked * removed unnecessary code for completing quota events (event locations don't exist past generation)
Apworld: * the company building is now logically required to get the kidnapper fox and vain shroud entries * players can now choose how many quota locations can be in a single multiworld sphere [@donedonedone278] #29
Other: * created an example csproj.user for contributors * created build scripts to make testing easier for contributors [@donedonedone278] #29 Mod version 0.7.12 works with apworld versions 0.7.11 - 0.7.12

entry.title: The Sims 4 v2.0.0
entry.content:
This release changes quite a bit about the APWorld. It adds a number of new features that are only meant for people to use if they're prepared for an unfinished experience.
## New additions/changes - DLC Skills - Multiple career support
In addition to the major features, lots has changed on the backend. The rules have been refactored to ensure better maintainability in the future, as well as some client fixes and squashed bugs.
This release is NOT backwards compatible with older games or sessions. A lot has changed, and attempting to use the new APWorld and client with the older game mod will result in issues. Please finish all your existing game before updating!
If you're wondering where the DLC options are, they're currently hidden because they're not prepared for general usage just yet. The DLC Skills have been tested and do work, but due to a lack of being able to lock most of them on the mod side, these options aren't ready for primetime despite being the headlining major feature for this update. We will update you when they become finished to a point where the experience doesn't suck.
This release should fix some stability issues, but there are still some glaring bugs that haven't yet been fixed due to an unfortunate series of events that are not of importance here.
## What's Changed * Minor bugfixes by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/1 * Select Multiple Careers by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/3 * WIP DLC skills by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/2 * Merge Main (Aug 12) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/4 * Merge Main (Aug 16) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/5 * Don't make location sending O(n^2) by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/7 * merge main (again) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/12 * Fix client launch missing args by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/13 * merge main (again) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/17 * Add CodeRabbit configuration by @coderabbitai[bot] in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/18 * Sims 4: Rules Refactor Part 1 by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/14 * Added a simple example for the set path by @mads-gregersen in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/20 * Add an additional check that /set_path was given an absolute file path by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/22 * try merging main by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/28 * Sims4 dev by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/30
## New Contributors * @silasary made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/1 * @benny-dreamly made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/3 * @coderabbitai[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/18 * @mads-gregersen made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/20
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/compare/1.7.5...2.0.0

entry.title: Age Of Mythology Retold v1.3.4
entry.content:
## Small Improvements and New Options - 👁️ New option to exclude 30. All is Not Lost from the pool. This is the scenario that has a **mandatory** 20 minute wait 😬 - 💎 New option to add gems as filler items. This will only be relevant in huge worlds, but in those, you can take them to shop E to buy more cards - ⚙️ Better generation. Improvements to generation difficulty slope and more reliable generation, especially in huge multi-worlds. - 🐧 Better Linux support. Hopefully, now works correctly on Linux and Steam Deck.
## 👍 Fully compatible with current games v1.1+
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.3.3...v1.3.4

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank v0.2.1b0
entry.content:
Generation stability improvements:
- Starting items now work again - Progressive packs should no longer cause generation failures - Standardised the naming convention of items and locations to match the ingame naming (mostly) - Added a mwgg compatible manifest - Gold weapons now actually put respective checks in logic if progressive weapons are set to normal (like the gold bomb glove will make Novalis Cave gold bolt shown in logic) - Extra weapons that made sense were added to the ranged weapons and explosive weapons logic requirements
